tasks.subject: Task 0: Vendor upstream input-prep helpers
tasks.description:
Vendor prepare_input_tensor + Causal_LQ4x_Proj from upstream examples/WanVSR/utils/utils.py (commit b527c6f2) into src/kinoforge/upscalers/flashvsr/_input_prep.py. Lazy torch+imageio imports. 4 unit tests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/upscalers/flashvsr/_input_prep.py", "tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_input_prep.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_input_prep.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["prepare_input_tensor 5-tuple", "Causal_LQ4x_Proj weight+bias+forward", "lazy imports", "upstream provenance docstring"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: FlashVSREngineConfig precision default bfloat16 + 4x native lock
tasks.description:
FlashVSREngineConfig.precision default bfloat16; allowlist {bfloat16, fp16, fp32}; UpscaleConfig._validate_flashvsr_wiring rejects non-4x factor.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_config.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default bfloat16", "bfloat16 accepted", "bf16 rejected", "non-4x cfg-time rejection"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Rewrite _runtime.py around diffsynth.FlashVSRFullPipeline
tasks.description:
Full rewrite of _runtime.py: lazy diffsynth import, ModelManager weights load, FullPipeline.from_model_manager + enable_vram_management + init_cross_kv + load_models_to_device, pipe(...) 16-kwarg call, imageio output writer, .to() delegates to load_models_to_device.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/upscalers/flashvsr/_runtime.py", "tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_runtime.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_runtime.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["diffsynth lazy import", "ModelManager weights load", "FullPipeline lifecycle", "pipe kwarg surface", "imageio writer", ".to() delegates", "_native_scale=4.0"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: FlashVSREngine.validate_spec rejects non-4x factor + bfloat16 slug
tasks.description:
validate_spec refuses factor!=4 with UpscaleFailed. model_identity returns flashvsr-wan21-bfloat16 slug.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/upscalers/flashvsr/_engine.py", "tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_engine.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_engine.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["non-4x raises UnsupportedScaleError", "height still rejected", "bfloat16 slug"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Rename upscale-flashvsr-x2 → -x4; bump precision + wan-multi cfg
tasks.description:
git mv the standalone cfg. Flip scale 2x→4x + precision fp16→bfloat16 + spec.model slug in both example cfgs. Update tests/live/test_flashvsr_live.py path + slug + dim assertion (src*2 → src*4).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/upscale-flashvsr-x4.yaml", "examples/configs/wan-with-upscale-flashvsr.yaml", "tests/test_examples.py", "tests/live/test_flashvsr_live.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_examples.py tests/upscalers/flashvsr/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["git mv preserves history", "scale=4x", "precision=bfloat16", "live-test refs updated"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Full-suite lint + typecheck + pre-commit
tasks.description:
Run pixi run test + lint + typecheck + pre-commit run --all-files.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test && pixi run lint && pixi run typecheck && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all four gates green"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Live smoke — un-xfail test_f_single on RunPod
tasks.description:
Preflight → fire test_f_single with KINOFORGE_LIVE_SPEND=1 → verify 4x dims + pod destroyed + spend ≤$0.15 → append successful-generations entry → bump PROGRESS.md T#8 to SHIPPED.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_flashvsr_live.py", "PROGRESS.md", "/workspace/successful-generations.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run preflight && KINOFORGE_LIVE_SPEND=1 pixi run pytest tests/live/test_flashvsr_live.py::test_f_single -v && pixi run kinoforge list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["preflight clean", "F-single green <15m", "4x dims verified", "pod destroyed", "spend <=$0.15", "successful-generations updated"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
